text:
Once upon a time in a sleepy little town called Willow Creek, there lived a strange old man nicknamed Odd-job. Everyone avoided him because he repairs things nobody wants. One sunny afternoon, Owl boy found him stranded atop Grimmauld Place.

"Why didn't you just stay inside?" Owl boy scoffed.

"Ah," Odd-job said slowly. "There's a beast roaming there. Ever heard of the Grim Circle?"

"No."

"Ahhh. Maybe it's after my umbrella."

Deciding Odd-job knew more than he did, Owl boy trailed him. They found cats chasing mice near Mrs. Norris's bedroom clock. Odd-job cast acharm.

"Might work."

Later, they discovered Sirius's old rat potion stash. Odd-job sprinkled charm dust everywhere.

"One drop to chase him. I'll lure him."

Hours later, owl pellets. They escaped.

"You think that’ll hold?"

"No. But I owe you."

They stole moonshine berries at midnight. Underneath Orion. Odd-job
